title: Improved Dye Textures
description: Backports the new dye textures to older versions for accessibility.
body:
Currently, these textures are only available in Bedrock Preview & Beta 1.21.110.20. However, thanks to the [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/), I was able to grab these textures and put them in a resource pack for Java users to enjoy!

These textures were updated to improve accessibility for visually impaired people. However, this pack's purpose is to bring that accessibility to all players regardless of the version they play!
